Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Omal]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Omal is a character who picked up Lemon.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 13''' — Omal is Aila's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 17''' — Omal is Mister Escalon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 17''' — Omal has the ability to sprout multiple hands and smiles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 17''' — Omal has an artificial eye that shines with orange light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Omal Escalon tests The Last Horizon against Aila Escalon and Hallow Divide.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 33''' — Omal is a gunslinger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Omal Escalon is a person whose presence on the planet prompted Lutoch Terelle to issue an emergency warning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Omal Escalon appeared on the edge of a VMC with wind and shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Omal Escalon has an orange eye.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
